logs.IBGE_CONNECTION_ERROR: Connection failure with IBGE open data servers.
logs.DATA_NORMALIZED: IBGE data converted to the institutional integrity standard.

errors.MUNICIPALITY_NOT_FOUND: The requested municipality was not identified in the IBGE database.
errors.PERSISTENCE_FAULT: Error while attempting to save territorial entities to the cloud database.
errors.ADN_CORRUPTION: The data format returned by IBGE is incompatible with the current contract.
